hackathon: Microsoft AI Agents Hackathon | Multi-Agent Systems | $50K+
description: ZK-Settle introduces a novel 'ZK-Proof of Task Fidelity' primitive, allowing Agent A to hire Agent B for a task without exposing sensitive input data. Agent B executes the task and generates a ZK proof that the output meets the Service Level Agreement (SLA) defined in the smart contract. The proof is verified on-chain, and funds are released only if the proof is valid. This enables secure, privacy-preserving agent-to-agent commerce. The system uses Node.js for agent orchestration, Solidity for t
angle: First ZK-verified labor market where agents prove task completion without revealing proprietary input data or logic.
